title: Tralla Room
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Tralla_Room.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The Tralla Room]]

The '''Tralla Room''' was one of eight identically impressive [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] rooms on the ''[[Coral Vanda]]'', named for the Tralla continent found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pantolomin/Legends|Pantolomin]]. Its three half-levels contained over a dozen [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] tables, along with numerous other locations to play [[Lugjack/Legends|lugjack]], [[tregald]], [[Holochess/Legends|holochess]] and [[crinbid]]. A long bar ran down the middle of the room so that alcohol was readily available to those who wished to celebrate or forget their time in the lavish casino.

==History==
[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] went to gamble in this room during the [[Thrawn campaign]] in order to find [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hoffner]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[Dark Force Rising 6|''Dark Force Rising'' 6]]
